# hubspot_custom_object_schema (Resource)

Manages a custom HubSpot object schema with continuously owned bootstrap properties.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `labels` (Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--labels))
- `name` (String)
- `primary_display_property` (String)
- `properties` (Map of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--properties))

### Optional

- `allows_sensitive_properties` (Boolean)
- `associated_objects` (Set of String)
- `deletion_protection` (Boolean)
- `description` (String)
- `expected_external_properties` (Set of String)
- `required_properties` (Set of String)
- `searchable_properties` (Set of String)
- `secondary_display_properties` (List of String)
- `should_create_same_object_association` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `fully_qualified_name` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `object_type_id` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--labels"></a>
### Nested Schema for `labels`

Required:

- `plural` (String)
- `singular` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--properties"></a>
### Nested Schema for `properties`

Required:

- `description` (String)
- `display_order` (Number)
- `field_type` (String)
- `form_field` (Boolean)
- `has_unique_value` (Boolean)
- `hidden` (Boolean)
- `label` (String)
- `options` (Map of String)
- `show_currency_symbol` (Boolean)
- `type` (String)
